app.error-popup.network-connection.defaultMessage: Network error, please check your internet connection.
app.error-popup.network-connection.description: alert pop up about the network connnection

appSettings.display-units-header.description: indicates option to select a metric or standard of measurement

appSettings.font-size-header.description: indicates option to select an app wide font size

appSettings.languages-header.description: indicates option to select a supported language to use in app

bottomNav.AppSettings-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to AppSettings

bottomNav.ManageStaff-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to ManageStaff

bottomNav.MyProfile-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to MyProfile

bottomNav.dashboard-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to dashboard

bottomNav.devices-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to Devices

bottomNav.events-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to Events

bottomNav.more-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to More

bottomNav.storages-tab-label.description: label for the button in the main app bottom navigation bar belonging to Storages

events.no-events-to-view.description: this displays if there are no sites to view

login.input-password.description: input label for Password on login page

login.input-username.description: input label for username on login page

login.login-credentials-failed.description: tells user that their login attempt failed, because either their username or password was incorrect

login.login-with-google.description: button to click to login using google account

login.login-with-microsoft.description: button to click to login using Microsoft account

sites.no-sites-to-view.description: this message displays if there are no sites to view
